name: Tee Time of Katy
address: 25707 Field House Rd Ste 120, Katy, TX 77494
about: Tee Time of Katy is an indoor golf simulator venue that utilizes TrackMan technology to offer precise game analysis and realistic play experiences. The facility provides bay rentals on an hourly basis, with pricing varying by time of day, and also offers a Gold Membership option for discounted rates. It is suited for golfers of all skill levels, from those looking to improve their game to groups seeking entertainment, and is available for events such as corporate outings, team building, and birthday parties. The venue combines technology with a fun, welcoming atmosphere, allowing for year-round play in a climate-controlled environment regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: World-class TrackMan technology for precise swing and ball analysis
Climate-controlled indoor facility available year-round regardless of weather
Option to play on dozens of famous virtual golf courses
Gold membership offering 5 free weekly hours and significant discounts
Suitable for both serious practice and casual group entertainment

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen available; menu linked on website
No mention of alcohol service on website

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor technology providing detailed ball flight and swing data

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not mentioned; the venue offers a full kitchen and food menu on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes is not specified on the website, as it depends on the simulator software and player speed.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly, offering a fun environment for children and mentioning 'indoor mini golf' as an activity.
